'''yodhagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:meanspirited|meanspirited]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-dh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meanspirited|meanspirited]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yodhagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodhagithi|yodhagithi]] || [[word:yodhagiji|yodhagiji]] || [[word:yodhagishi|yodhagishi]] || [[word:yodhagiki|yodhagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodhaguthuthu|yodhaguthuthu]] || [[word:yodhagujuju|yodhagujuju]] || [[word:yodhagushushu|yodhagushushu]] || [[word:yodhagukuku|yodhagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodhaguthu|yodhaguthu]] || [[word:yodhaguju|yodhaguju]] || [[word:yodhagushu|yodhagushu]] || [[word:yodhaguku|yodhaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodhagufthuf|yodhagufthuf]] || [[word:yodhagufjuf|yodhagufjuf]] || [[word:yodhagufshuf|yodhagufshuf]] || [[word:yodhagufkuf|yodhagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodhagethe|yodhagethe]] || [[word:yodhageje|yodhageje]] || [[word:yodhageshe|yodhageshe]] || [[word:yodhageke|yodhageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodhagothotho|yodhagothotho]] || [[word:yodhagojojo|yodhagojojo]] || [[word:yodhagoshosho|yodhagoshosho]] || [[word:yodhagokoko|yodhagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodhagotho|yodhagotho]] || [[word:yodhagojo|yodhagojo]] || [[word:yodhagosho|yodhagosho]] || [[word:yodhagoko|yodhagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodhagofthof|yodhagofthof]] || [[word:yodhagofjof|yodhagofjof]] || [[word:yodhagofshof|yodhagofshof]] || [[word:yodhagofkof|yodhagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodhagïfthïf|yodhagïfthïf]] || [[word:yodhagïfjïf|yodhagïfjïf]] || [[word:yodhagïfshïf|yodhagïfshïf]] || [[word:yodhagïfkïf|yodhagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodhagïfthïfthïf|yodhagïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:yodhagïfjïfjïf|yodhagïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:yodhagïfshïfshïf|yodhagïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:yodhagïfkïfkïf|yodhagïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodhagïfthïf|yodhagïfthïf]] || [[word:yodhagïfjïf|yodhagïfjïf]] || [[word:yodhagïfshïf|yodhagïfshïf]] || [[word:yodhagïfkïf|yodhagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodhagïfthïf|yodhagïfthïf]] || [[word:yodhagïfjïf|yodhagïfjïf]] || [[word:yodhagïfshïf|yodhagïfshïf]] || [[word:yodhagïfkïf|yodhagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodhagæthæ|yodhagæthæ]] || [[word:yodhagæjæ|yodhagæjæ]] || [[word:yodhagæshæ|yodhagæshæ]] || [[word:yodhagækæ|yodhagækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodhagathatha|yodhagathatha]] || [[word:yodhagajaja|yodhagajaja]] || [[word:yodhagashasha|yodhagashasha]] || [[word:yodhagakaka|yodhagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodhagatha|yodhagatha]] || [[word:yodhagaja|yodhagaja]] || [[word:yodhagasha|yodhagasha]] || [[word:yodhagaka|yodhagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodhagafthaf|yodhagafthaf]] || [[word:yodhagafjaf|yodhagafjaf]] || [[word:yodhagafshaf|yodhagafshaf]] || [[word:yodhagafkaf|yodhagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yodhagasha|yodhagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yodhagshësha|yodhagshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yodhagrosha|yodhagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yodhagmusha|yodhagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yodhagyasha|yodhagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyodhagnkshësha|goyodhagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyodhagnkrosha|goyodhagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyodhagnkmusha|goyodhagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyodhagnkyasha|goyodhagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yodhadhagasha|yodhadhagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yodhadhagshësha|yodhadhagshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yodhadhagrosha|yodhadhagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yodhadhagmusha|yodhadhagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yodhadhagyasha|yodhadhagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyodhadhagnkshësha|goyodhadhagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyodhadhagnkrosha|goyodhadhagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyodhadhagnkmusha|goyodhadhagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyodhadhagnkyasha|goyodhadhagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yedhægasha|yedhægasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yedhægshësha|yedhægshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yedhægrosha|yedhægrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yedhægmusha|yedhægmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yedhægyasha|yedhægyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyedhægnkshësha|goyedhægnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyedhægnkrosha|goyedhægnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyedhægnkmusha|goyedhægnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyedhægnkyasha|goyedhægnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yodhfagasha|yodhfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yodhfagshësha|yodhfagshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yodhfagrosha|yodhfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yodhfagmusha|yodhfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yodhfagyasha|yodhfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyodhfagnkshësha|goyodhfagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyodhfagnkrosha|goyodhfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyodhfagnkmusha|goyodhfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyodhfagnkyasha|goyodhfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
